title: 101 Great Tramps in New Zealand
author: Rodney Smith
description: 101 Great Tramps of New Zealand contains all of this country's classic tramps, from internationally known tracks such as the Tongariro Crossing, the Abel Tasman Coastal Track and the Milford Track, to popular regional tramps such as Totara Flats in the Tararua Ranges, and the Around the Mountain cir
